chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: Sometimes we write code and there is an error.  In fact, sometimes, no, there is an error in our code.  It happens often.  In this case, when a programmer makes a mistake,  or sometimes the mistake can be caused by a server,

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: maybe we have ordered some records from the server  and those records could not come from the server due to server error.  In this case, our Python program can terminate.  We don't want our program to stop due to any error.  That's why we do error handling in our Python program.

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: And to handle errors in Python, we use try-except.  Try-except exception handling.  This video will tell you how easy it is.  Let's go to the computer screen  and see how error handling is done in Python.

chunks.text: like you ordered data from the server  and the data that came from the server came in the wrong format  or the server was not working  or for any reason, that data could not be compatible.  In this case, you will see an error.
